summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Recovery 62 · Average · HRV -6%
Strain 2% · Minimal · 17 cal spent
Sleep 6h 10m · Fair · Above baseline

Read
You slept better than you have all week but woke up only moderately charged — a steady, capable day, not a peak one.

TRAINING
Train, but keep it to one solid resistance session, moderate weight and effort; skip grinding to failure or piling on extra volume.

NUTRITION
You're starting empty — get a protein-heavy breakfast in within the hour, aim for 35 to 40g now, and stay near your full calorie target so the deficit stays gentle and muscle's protected.

RECOVERY
Lock in tonight's bedtime to repeat last night's better sleep; that's what keeps this middling recovery from sliding lower.

Performance: Train, but keep it to one solid resistance session, moderate weight and effort; skip grinding to failure or piling on extra volume.

Transit: none
